headline: Cencora to Support U.S. Distribution of Kite’s CAR T-Cell Therapies
summary: CONSHOHOCKEN, Pa., June 02, 2026--Cencora today announced an agreement with Kite, a Gilead Company, to support the distribution of Kite’s U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA)-approved CAR T-cell therapies, Yescarta® (axicabtagene ciloleucel) and Tecartus® (brexucabtagene autoleucel).
